title: Bonus: Drop Us A Line - September 2025 - Video
content:
Enjoy this filmed version of our September Drop Us A Line episode, free for everyone!

If you liked being able to see Andy crying with laughter, why not consider signing up for our Plenty More Fish or Friend of the Podcast tiers! You'll get a filmed version of Drop Us A Line every fortnight, plus so much more.
